feed.description: Software engineering conversations: reliability, architecture, delivery, and the tradeoffs nobody puts in the blog post.
feed.title: Practical Systems

bullets:
# Practical Systems — Episode
## On-Call That Doesn't Break People
Host: Ethan
Guest: Priya
Ethan: Welcome back to Practical Systems.
Today we're talking about on call rotation, and I'm joined by Priya, principal SRE at a payments platform.
Excited for this one — incident response and on-call design is something I've been thinking about a lot.
